description: Amazon GuardDuty adds threat detection for AWS Lambda. After you enable Lambda Network Activity Monitoring, GuardDuty starts monitoring network activity, starting with VPC flow logs, for existing and new Lambda functions in your account. Current GuardDuty users can enable Lambda Network Activity Monitoring with a single step in the GuardDuty console for all the accounts in an organization by using AWS Organizations.
